data.title: Ex-Binance CEO in talks with around 12 governments regarding tokenization of state assets at the World Economic Forum.
data.description: At the recent World Economic Forum in Davos, ex-CEO of Binance Changpeng Zhao revealed his involvement in advising multiple governments about the process of tokenizing state assets. Zhao stated this during his speech, indicating that he is utilizing his expertise in the field to assist these governments. This news highlights the increasing importance of tokenization in the global financial sector, with Zhao's consultations potentially impacting a significant number of state assets worldwide.

data.title: Hospitality jobs like cooks, janitors, and delivery drivers lead hiring in Texas in 2026 with 21,070 job postings analyzed.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, as of January 22, 2026, recent data from OysterLink showcases the top sought-after hospitality positions in the state for 2026. This insight is drawn from a comprehensive review of 21,070 job listings released across Texas from October to December 2025. The study underscores the specific areas where employers are actively recruiting talent.

data.title: Japan's data center market valued at USD 12.76 billion in 2025, projected to reach USD 38.91 billion by 2031, with a growth rate of 20.42%. Operating 119 data centers, most built to Tier III standards in Tokyo.
data.description: A report titled "Japan Data Center Market - Investment Analysis & Growth Opportunities 2026-2031" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's available reports. The Japan Data Center Market achieved a value of USD 12.76 billion in 2025 and is anticipated to hit USD 38.91 billion by 2031, with a notable growth rate of 20.42% CAGR. Currently, Japan boasts approximately 119 functional colocation data centers, with a focus on developing them in line with Tier III standards. Tokyo stands out as the premier data center destination in the country.

data.title: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage at 6.09%, lowest in three years (Jan. 22, 2026).
data.description: Today, Freddie Mac based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ®) for January 22, 2026. According to the report, the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stands at 6.09%.

data.title: Orthodontist Ben Thornton shares tips to manage discomfort during treatment in HelloNation article from Eugene, OR.
data.description: In Eugene, Oregon on January 22, 2026, an article by HelloNation features Orthodontics Expert Ben Thornton discussing ways for patients to improve comfort during orthodontic treatment. The article addresses the importance of patient involvement in enhancing comfort during orthodontic procedures.

data.title: U.S. stocks rise; Dow up 0.78% to 49,462.35, NASDAQ up 0.94% to 23,443.19, S&P 500 up 0.63% to 6,918.78. Abbott shares fall 7%.
data.description: Midway through trading, U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Nasdaq Composite surging over 200 points on Thursday. The Dow rose by 0.78% to 49,462.35, while the NASDAQ increased by 0.94% to 23,443.19. Similarly, the S&P 500 climbed by 0.63% to 6,918.78. Communication services shares were the top performers, rising by 1.3%, whereas utilities stocks dropped by 0.5%. Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) experienced a significant decline of over 7% after falling short of expectations in their Q4 2025 sales and Q1 2026 earnings outlook. The quarterly sales totaled $11.46 billion, missing the expected $11.80 billion, with a 4.4% increase reported. Adjusted earnings were $1.50, matching Wall Street estimates. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Commercial Food Dehydrator Market valued at USD 750.27 million in 2024, projected to reach USD 949.29 million by 2030. Major players include The Legacy Companies, Tribest, LEM Products, Vesync, Magic Mill, and The Metal Ware Corp.
data.description: In Dublin, a new report on the Commercial Food Dehydrator Market predicts significant growth in the coming years. The market was valued at USD 750.27 million in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 949.29 million by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.00%. The global market for commercial food dehydrators is characterized by fragmentation, with a variety of established global companies such as The Legacy Companies, Tribest, LEM Products, Vesync Co., Ltd, and Magi leading the industry.

data.title: JIM's 2025 Generosity Index reveals Americans are becoming more selective with tipping. Report analyzes 89,068 tipping transactions from 6,214 merchants across 50 states.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, JIM.com has announced the release of the 2025 JIM Generosity Index, which examines the economic impact of tipping in small businesses across the United States. The report is based on data from 89,068 verified tipping transactions conducted by 6,214 active merchants in 177 business categories across all 50 states. This analysis provides insights into the trends and patterns of gratitude shown through tipping, showcasing the top states in terms of generosity. JIM.com is a real-time payment app that utilizes an AI business assistant to facilitate transactions.

data.title: Jack in the Box & The Hundreds partner for "Jack Was Here" collection celebrating 75th anniversary, with four limited drops in 2026.
data.description: In San Diego, Jack in the Box (NASDAQ: JACK) and LA-based streetwear label The Hundreds have partnered to mark Jack in the Box’s 75th anniversary with a collection merging street culture, community, and unique experiences. The collaborative "Jack Was Here!" line debuts on January 28, initiating a series of four exclusive releases in 2026. The collection will feature the iconic Jack Box alongside The Hundreds’ Adam Bomb.

data.title: FloDesk sees record growth, surpassing $36M in ARR and generating $33M in revenue for its 100,000 users.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 22, 2026, Flodesk, a visually-oriented email marketing platform, disclosed remarkable progress. The company, relied upon by in excess of 100,000 small businesses and creators, achieved unprecedented success by exceeding $36 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) and facilitating over $33 million in earnings for its clientele. This achievement marks a significant milestone for Flodesk, highlighting its impact and contribution to the email marketing industry.

data.title: Organizations focus on resilience and identity to combat cyber risks amid AI threats and regulatory pressure, according to Info-Tech report.
data.description: Security leaders are facing escalating challenges from AI-driven threats, rising regulatory demands, and heightened dependence on third-party services. To enhance defenses without impeding progress, they must address these issues head-on. The recently published Security Priorities 2026 study by Info-Tech provides valuable insights for organizations navigating these complexities. This comprehensive report outlines key strategies for fortifying security measures amid these evolving landscapes.

data.title: Polar vortex could lead to pests invading homes, says National Pest Management Association.
data.description: Fairfax, VA - The National Pest Management Association has issued a warning that the polar vortex is driving pests into households. The organization's experts advise on effective strategies to ready homes and shield against this invasion.

data.title: VINITALY.USA 2026 festival in NYC on Oct 26-27 at Pier 36; NY represents 6.5% of US wine consumption.
data.description: Verona, Italy - On January 22, 2026, it was reported that the State of New York accounts for 6.5% of total wine consumption in the United States, making it the third-largest market nationally after California and Texas. Additionally, New York holds the top spot in the Northeast region with 34% of wine consumption.
